description_long: This is a modern military-style helicopter with a streamlined, angular fuselage painted in a muted green color. The helicopter features a prominent main rotor with four long, black blades and a tail rotor mounted on the vertical stabilizer at the end of a slender tail boom. The cockpit is equipped with large, faceted windows that provide wide visibility, and the body includes subtle panel lines and access hatches. The landing gear consists of two robust skids attached to the underside of the fuselage, designed for stability on various surfaces. Small orange markings are visible on the tips of the rotor blades, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise subdued color scheme. The helicopter's overall design suggests it is built for maneuverability and utility in urban or tactical environments.
description: A sleek, green military-style helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, angular cockpit windows, and sturdy landing skids. Orange-tipped rotor blades and a streamlined tail boom complete its tactical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular cockpit windows, the main rotor blades extending outward, and the narrow profile of the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the tail boom, the side door, and the landing skids beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail rotor, the vertical stabilizer, and the symmetry of the skids and tail structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite side of the fuselage, tail boom, and landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with orange tips, each blade approximately 6 meters in length and featuring a narrow, aerodynamic profile.
attribute_tail_rotor: A two-blade tail rotor mounted vertically on the left side of the tail fin, colored black with no visible markings, partially enclosed by a protective structure.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular landing skids made of metal, painted black, with crossbars for structural support and flat footpads at each end for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five large, faceted cockpit windows arranged in a wraparound configuration, slightly tinted, with black framing and no visible markings.
